title: Backpacked: Shells
description: Add-on for Backpacked! Adds two backpacks, the natulis shell, and the snail shell!
body:
# Backpacked: Shells

* An add-on for **[Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked)** by **MrCrayfish**
* Adds **two shell backpacks**! The **Snail Shell** and the **Nautilus Shell**!
* To unlock the **Snail Shell** backpack, you must **sneak** 5000 blocks
* To unlock the **Nautilus Shell** backpack, you must **swim** 5000 blocks

*** 
If you find **any issues, let me know** on [Discord](https://discord.gg/Uttj34u4PJ)!
